name: wingman/strux
description: A comprehensive suite of typed, immutable-capable data structures for PHP applications, including collections, maps, sets, queues, graphs, and more.

suggest.wingman/argus: Required to run the test suite.
suggest.wingman/corvus: Enables signal emission via the Corvus bridge.
suggest.wingman/verix: Enables schema-based type validation via the Verix bridge.
